name: openclaw
description: OpenClaw AI agent integration — delegate tasks, manage sessions, install & deploy

openClawApiKey.description: Authentication token for the OpenClaw gateway

openClawBaseUrl.description: WebSocket URL for the OpenClaw gateway

trait: Use openclaw_delegate to hand off complex tasks to the OpenClaw agent for autonomous execution, openclaw_status to check task progress, and openclaw_list_sessions to see active sessions. Best for long-running coding tasks, file operations, or multi-step automations that benefit from a dedicated agent.
